operating_policy.green_use: Primary/client-facing source when facts appear directly on the source or are operator verified.
operating_policy.yellow_use: Discovery or review-only lead. Requires manual confirmation before client delivery.
operating_policy.red_use: Do not scrape, bypass login/paywalls, or use in client deliverables.

sources.name: Manual client and analyst intake
sources.publish_policy: Client-facing only after human review and source URL check.

sources.name: Google Business Profile review/manual observation
sources.publish_policy: Manual observation only. Do not claim exact rankings without evidence.

sources.name: Example public industry RSS source
sources.publish_policy: Discovery only until replaced by a real public source and reviewed.
